features.name: Regeneration
features.text: Gunk regains 5 hit points at the start of his turn. If Gunk takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of his next turn.

actions.name: Throw Goblin
actions.text: Gunk can throw a willing Small creature up to 30 feet. See the Gunk Throw Chart for accuracy.

summary.description: An enormous troll who lives under a bridge at the west end of Snotrocket territory. Easily nine feet tall, covered in a permanent layer of green-grey slime, with patches of moss and small mushrooms growing in the folds of his skin. He speaks in a deep, slow rumble, often forgets what he was saying mid-sentence, and starts over. He has an alliance with the Snotrockets, who bring him a surface rat every month. Gunk can throw goblins across the sludge moat to get them into the Dripfort.

encounters.description: Found under his bridge at the junction where Snotrocket territory meets the Blackflow. If recruited, he waits at the southern edge of the sludge moat.

groups.creatures: Gunk alone under his bridge, gnawing on a bicycle wheel

behavior.text: Sitting under his bridge, gnawing on junk and picking his nose with a finger the size of a goblin's forearm.
Waiting at the sludge moat's southern edge, ready to throw goblins across.
